jd_text: About the Role: King Salman International Airport Development Company (KSIADC) is seeking an experienced Director – Enterprise Solutions Management to lead enterprise platforms across airport operations, ensuring systems are scalable, integrated, and support critical business and operational functions. Key Responsibilities: • Lead the overall strategy, planning, and governance of enterprise solutions across the organization. • Oversee implementation and lifecycle management of ERP, HCM, Finance, Procurement, and airport-related systems. • Ensure integration between enterprise systems and airport operational systems (e.g. passenger, baggage, operations platforms). • Drive system standardization, eliminating duplication and improving efficiency across platforms. • Define and enforce governance frameworks, policies, and architecture standards for all enterprise solutions. • Manage relationships with system vendors, implementation partners, and managed service providers. • Oversee SLAs, KPIs, and vendor performance to ensure service quality and system reliability. • Ensure compliance with cybersecurity, data protection, and regulations (e.g. NCA, SDAIA). • Lead digital transformation initiatives across enterprise platforms to improve automation and user experience. • Collaborate with business stakeholders to translate operational needs into system capabilities. • Oversee system upgrades, enhancements, and release management processes. • Manage enterprise systems budget, cost optimization, and value realization (ROI). • Ensure business continuity, disaster recovery readiness, and incident management processes. • Act as escalation point for major system issues impacting airport operations. • Build and lead a high-performing team across solutions, applications, and support functions. Qualification and Experience: Bachelor’s in IT, Computer Science or related field. 12+ years in enterprise systems including leadership roles.
